lastSummary: 2 overnight tasks completed: (1) Raise-intel repo expanded 3x with 14 new entries — comparable raises (SavvyMoney $225M, Silverflow $40M, Plaid $8B), market validation ($129B problem, 50% involuntary churn), regulatory tailwinds (Canada open banking Phase 1), macro signals ($48B open banking market).
